Records.authors: Johansson, Henrik, Kosower, David A., Larsen, Kasper J.
Records.description: Planar double-box integral with four massive external legs and massless internal lines. The paper constructs generalized discontinuity operators (master contours) via maximal unitarity to extract the coefficients of the 4 master integrals in the two-loop amplitude basis expansion. IBP identities impose no contour constraints in this four-mass case; only parity-odd Levi-Civita insertions constrain the contours. An equal-mass specialization ($k_1^2=k_4^2$, $k_2^2=k_3^2$) reduces the master count to 3.

Records.authors: He, Song, Jiang, Xuhang, Liu, Jiahao, Yang, Qinglin
Records.description: Two-loop four-mass double-box integral family in $D=4-2\varepsilon$ with 7 propagators and 2 ISPs. 74 master integrals, 68 symbol letters. Top sector has 4 master integrals ($J_1$-$J_4$); double-triangle sector has 7 master integrals ($J_{27}$-$J_{33}$) per sub-sector. For $J_1, J_2, J_3$ (and $J_{27}$-$J_{32}$), unique Schubert problems exist with one-to-one correspondence to UT basis; $J_4$ (and $J_{33}$) lack unique maximal cuts. All CDE entries for the top sector and double-triangle sector reproduced via cross-ratios of Schubert solutions. 11 square roots ($r_1$ through $r_{11}$) appear in the alphabet.
Records.familyName: four-mass double-box with massless propagators in D=4-2eps

Records.description: 4-mass ladder family, ladder4pt_L2_massless-internal-offshell-external. Planar L-rung box ladder: rails t_1..t_{L+1}, b_1..b_{L+1}; rail edges (t_i,t_{i+1}), (b_i,b_{i+1}); rungs (t_i,b_i); 4 off-shell external legs at t_1, t_{L+1}, b_1, b_{L+1}. 2L+2 vertices, 3L+1 propagators, L loops. Massless internal lines. Value = PhiLadder[2, 1/3, 1/5].

Basso-Dixon fishnet family, basso-dixon_L2x1_massless-internal-offshell-external. Basso-Dixon fishnet B_{M,N}: an M x N rectangular grid, 4 external operators at the corners, defined in dual (region-momentum) space via products of 1/x_ij^2 propagators. The L = MN loop integral is conformal. Momentum space: the (M+1) x (N+1) vertex grid (2MN+M+N massless edges, 4 off-shell corner legs, MN loops); B_{M,1} = the M-rung 4-pt ladder; transpose symmetry fixes the canonical orientation M >= N. Value = BassoDixonI[2, 1, 1/3, 1/5].

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the double box computed via principal Landau determinants.
